item.title: Fri, 8 May 2026 21:18:00 UTC
item.description: <pre> Re-added support for slack-required. This was a time-consuming process; please note that some packages were only "repackaged" rather than recompiled from scratch, due to limited computing power. I hope this covers everything. If you encounter any bugs or issues, please let me know. Hope you enjoy the update! item.title: Thu, 7 May 2026 18:57:24 UTC
item.description:
I've added fluxion and its dependencies to the repository.
It is functional, but I have experienced occasional system freezes,
so please use it with caution. Feel free to test it and let me know
if you find any bugs or have any suggestions.

installation as lean as possible. If you run into any

Bug reports and feedback are highly appreciated!
